case_title: JAMES, MAURICE vs. HARRIS, JIM D. et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAMES, MAURICE AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, JIM D. DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT HARRIS, JIM D. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HARRIS, JIM D.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MANIWA, KAZUO CHRIS SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR JAMES, MAURICE
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAMES, MAURICE COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-28-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPARTMENT #8, JUDGE LILLIAN K. SING. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. TERMS OF SAID STIPULATED JUDGMENT READ INTO THE COURT RECORD AND RECORDED BY REPORTER, BELDON YEE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, JIM D. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 914 DIVISADERO STREET #302 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL AUG-04-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. FAILS TO VACATE THE PREMISE BY 8/34/93 PLAINTIFF MAY APPLY FOR AN IMMEDIATE WRIT OF POSSESSION. IF DEFT VACATES ON OR BEFORE 8/4/93, PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT OF $1,475.00. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COST AND ATTORNEY FEES.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
